notes: Netherlands are without Jurriën Timber (groin, ruled out of tournament), Matthijs de Ligt (back surgery), Xavi Simons (injury, not called up), and Jerdy Schouten (ACL); GK Bart Verbruggen is a major doubt after a bruised hip in the Uzbekistan warm-up, with Memphis Depay also carrying a hamstring issue and likely to start on the bench. Japan have suffered devastating pre-tournament blows: captain Wataru Endo (foot surgery, retired from internationals), star winger Kaoru Mitoma (hamstring), and…
